title: Kwemlys Community Pack
body:
# Minecraft Modpack for Kwemly's Community
A custom **Minecraft 1.21.8** modpack designed for **adventure**, **performance** and **good visuals**.

## Features
- Optimized performance
- Improved visuals (Fresh Animations, Distant Horizon, etc.)
- Many QoL Mods (Harvest with ease, REI, Xaero's Minimap, Veinminer Enchantment, etc.)
- Realistic World Gen (Lithosphere + Still Life)

## Some included Mods (Highlights)
- AmbientSounds
- Cooking for Blockheads
- Farmers Delight + Add-Ons
- Distant Horizon
- Dungeos and Taverns + Add-Ons
- Macaw's Mods
- Resource Backpack's
- Stellarity
- Storage Drawers
- Waystones

## Resource and Shader Packs (Highlights)
- Default HD 128
- Fresh Animations
- Dramatic Skys
- Enhanced Lightning Sound
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound + Euphoria Patches
- Photon Shaders

## License & Usage
- All included mods and resources are owned by their respective creators and are used under their license. All rights reserved.
